title: 日本ダービーの後に・汝が花開くは

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(It was as if the passage of time itself slowed to a
crawl.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I committed my heart and soul to that race, and
as I ran, I felt nothing else but a desperate desire
to win.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(However, the same can be said for them, and in
that moment... the one whose desire was
strongest... blossomed.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I don't want to lose! I don't want to! And I'm not going to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This race... is mine... to WIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (The sound of glass cracking?! No! This is...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The sound of Chiyono O breaking through her limit, right now?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Sakura Chiyono O! Sakura Chiyono O is on
the move!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: HAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I can't lose! I have to... keep going!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'll break my own limits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (There's no doubt in my mind. In that crucial moment of contest, I, too, pounded on those sealed gates—the limits holding me back!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(That must've been a result of my witnessing
Chiyono O going beyond her limits.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Competing against her fanned the flames of my
desire for victory!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I had no idea! To think that the heat of the race
plays home to such a dazzling world of
possibilities!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(If I could set foot into that world once more,
then I...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Right now, I...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I forgot all about surpassing my older sister...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... I won the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Sakura Chiyono O! Hurrah!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That was such an amazing race! They were all so good!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan! You were sooo close! But you were
sooo cool, too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo. Congratulations. I mean it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (You gave me a glimpse into that world...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to meet with Mejiro Ardan after her
excellent showing at the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do apologize. I was unable to land you the title
of Derby trainer.
choice_data_list: That's okay. Besides, you look pretty content.
That's okay. Besides, you look pretty content.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: I couldn't ask for anything more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan did the very best she could at the
Japanese Derby. That's why, in this moment, she
looks so liberated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I'm over the moon to see her like
this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I had an experience most peculiar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As I neared the finish line, an unfamiliar sensation
welled up inside, as if the whole world was falling
still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the silence, I could hear two things very
clearly—Chiyono O and Yaeno's heartbeats, and
the sound of their feet hitting the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With that rhythm drawing me in... I pounded on
the gates holding me back—my own limits—and
caught a glimpse of the new world that lies
beyond them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sensation I felt in that moment—the firm
belief that I can aim for even greater
heights—lingers in my hands even now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And there was something else... Something that
took even me by surprise...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't until the race was over... that I
remembered my goal is to outshine my older
sister...
choice_data_list:
...That just goes to show that you were giving
your all as you competed with your rivals.

...That just goes to show that you were giving
your all as you competed with your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Giving my all... with my rivals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're quite right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Those two are my dearest friends... and my
toughest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's because I competed with everything I could muster—to the point that I forgot about my older sister...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And because they gave that race everything they had too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That I was able to glimpse that dazzlingly bright
world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As someone who's always striven to run in her own
way, in a now that's all her own, today's discovery
will probably change things in a big way for
Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure of that myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan's legs carry her to a new
world of possibilities!
